---
jupyter: python3
format: 
  pdf:
    echo: false
    geometry:
      - top=5mm        
      - left=5mm
      - right=5mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - headheight=35mm 
      - headsep=5mm 
      - includehead=true 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{tabularx}
          \usepackage{multirow}
          \usepackage{graphicx}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \usepackage{multicol}
          \usepackage{ifthen}

          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{} 
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \newcounter{score}
          
          \fancyhead[C]{
            \noindent
            \bgroup
            \def\arraystretch{1.4}
            \begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{|p{5.5cm}|p{1.8cm}|X|p{1.2cm}|p{1.8cm}|}
            \hline
            \multirow{5}{5.5cm}{
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \includegraphics[width=4.5cm]{logo} \\
                \fontsize{6pt}{7pt}\selectfont
                \textbf{CIVIL \& ENVIRONMENTAL ENGINEERING,}\\
                SKEMPTON BUILDING, IMPERIAL COLLEGE\\
                LONDON, SOUTH KENSINGTON CAMPUS,\\
                LONDON SW7 2AZ.\\[3mm]
                \normalsize\textbf{CALCULATION SHEET}
            }
            & \textbf{Job No.} & & \textbf{Sheet} & \textbf{Ref} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \textbf{Job Title} & Steel Design Coursework & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}} \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multicolumn{4}{p{\dimexpr\textwidth-5.5cm-8\tabcolsep-5\arrayrulewidth\relax}|}{
                \textbf{Subject} \newline
                \vspace*{1mm}
                \centerline{ WE LC3 - Overall Deflection Calculation }
                \vspace*{1mm}
            } \\ \cline{2-5}
            & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Client}} & \textbf{Made by} \quad  Pablo Peng & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date} \quad 03/03/2026} \\ \cline{3-5}
            & & \textbf{Checked by} \quad  Vincent Chan & \multicolumn{2}{l|}{\textbf{Date}} \\ \hline
            \end{tabularx}
            \egroup
          }
---
\Large 
\linespread{1.4}
\selectfont

#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
```{python}
load_case = 'LC2'
direction = 'WE'
scheme = 'A'

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Select type based on direction
if direction == 'NS':
    type = 'Y'
elif direction == 'WE':
    type = 'X'  

# Select model based on scheme
if scheme == 'A':
    model = pd.read_csv('Model_A.csv')
elif scheme == 'B':
    model = pd.read_csv('Model_A.csv')

# Define load factors based on load case and model results
if load_case == 'LC1':
    if direction == 'NS':
        delta_model = np.array([3.86, 7.81, 11.89, 16.94, 21.90, 27.60, 32.93, 38.69, 43.83])
    elif direction == 'WE':
        delta_model = np.array([5.25, 8.40, 13.02, 16.42, 21.12, 24.43, 28.84, 31.15, 35.35])
    
elif load_case == 'LC2':
    if direction == 'NS':
        delta_model = np.array([5.32, 10.74, 16.32, 23.24, 30.04, 37.85, 45.15, 53.04, 60.08])
    elif direction == 'WE':
        delta_model = np.array([7.48, 11.81, 18.25, 23.01, 29.59, 34.22, 40.38, 44.32, 49.50])

elif load_case == 'LC3':
    if direction == 'NS':
        delta_model = np.array([4.50, 9.06, 13.77, 19.60, 25.31, 31.91, 38.07, 44.72, 50.66])
    elif direction == 'WE':
        delta_model = np.array([6.45, 10.09, 15.59, 19.56, 25.26, 29.21, 34.46, 37.83, 42.25])

def data_prep(df, LC1, LC2, LC3):
    storey_height = df['Z'].unique()[::-1]

    df1x = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC1) & (df['Direction'] == 'X')]
    df1y = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC1) & (df['Direction'] == 'Y')]

    df2x = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC2) & (df['Direction'] == 'X')]
    df2y = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC2) & (df['Direction'] == 'Y')]

    df3x = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC3) & (df['Direction'] == 'X')]
    df3y = df[(df['Output Case'] == LC3) & (df['Direction'] == 'Y')]
    
    df_dict = {'LC1': {'X': df1x, 'Y': df1y},'LC2': {'X': df2x, 'Y': df2y},'LC3': {'X': df3x, 'Y': df3y}}
    return storey_height,df_dict

def deflection(df_dict, type, load_case):    
    df = df_dict[load_case][type].sort_values('Z', ascending=True).copy()
    df.loc[:, 'Deflection'] = df['Drift']*df['Z']*1000
    df.loc[:, 'Total Deflection'] = df['Deflection'][::].cumsum()
    return df, df['Total Deflection'].to_numpy()

def deflection_plot(df_dict, delta_model, type, load_case):
    df, _ = deflection(df_dict, type, load_case)
    
    plt.rcParams['font.family'] = 'Times New Roman'
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 5))
    ax.plot(df['Total Deflection'], df['Z'], label='Etabs Results')
    ax.plot(delta_model, df['Z'], color = 'black', label='ANSYS Results')
    ax.set_xlabel('Total Deflection (mm)')
    ax.set_ylabel('Storey Height (m)')

    if type == 'X':  
        if load_case == 'LC1':
            ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height for Load Case 1 in West-East Direction')
        elif load_case == 'LC2':
            ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height for Load Case 2 in West-East Direction')
        elif load_case == 'LC3':
            ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height for Load Case 3 in West-East Direction')
            
    elif type == 'Y':
        if load_case == 'LC1':
            ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height for Load Case 1 in North-South Direction')
        elif load_case == 'LC2':
            ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height for Load Case 2 in North-South Direction')
        elif load_case == 'LC3':
            ax.set_title('Deflection vs Storey Height for Load Case 3 in North-South Direction')
            
    ax.grid(linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
    plt.legend()
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

LC1 = '1.35Gk + 1.05Qk + 1.50WkX + EHF'
LC2 = '1.35Gk + 1.50Qk + 0.75WkY + EHF'
LC3 = '1.0Gk + 1.50WkX + EHF'
storey_height, df_dict = data_prep(model, LC1, LC2, LC3)
_, etabs_deflection = deflection(df_dict, type = type, load_case = load_case)
```

```{python}
#| output: asis

# First column contains row labels; storey values run horizontally to the right.
cols = ['Storey Height (m)'] + [f"{int(s)}" for s in storey_height]
table_horizontal = pd.DataFrame([
    ['Etabs Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{d:.2f}" for d in etabs_deflection],
    ['ANSYS Deflection (mm)'] + [f"{d:.2f}" for d in delta_model]], columns=cols)

latex_table = table_horizontal.to_latex(index=False,escape=False,column_format='|l|' + 'c|' * len(storey_height))

print(r"\normalfont")
print(r"\setlength{\tabcolsep}{7pt}")
print(latex_table)
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

#
```{python}
deflection_plot(df_dict, delta_model, type = type, load_case = load_case)
```
